name: Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:

(Cookie!User.) (Vanillan!User.) (Winged!User.) (Father!Pure Vanilla.) (Platonic!Yandere!Pure Vanilla.)

The Moment That You Took My Hand. Was The Best Thing That Ever Happened. Guys, The 1975.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

⋘ 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒊𝒕, 𝒅𝒂𝒕𝒂 𝒊𝒔 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈... ⋙

────── ⋆⋅⚛︎ ⋅⋆ ────────

⋘ 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒔𝒖𝒄𝒄𝒆𝒔𝒔 ! 𝒑𝒖𝒍𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒑 𝒊𝒏𝒇𝒐... ⋙

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

You were the most important thing he had ever had a hand in, bakes by his own hands. Small, soft, fragile, you came into his world and brightened it.

And he watched you grow, soon stuck with the realisation that he may outlive you.

And...

Pure Vanilla hates how he can't find any baby feathers on your wings that held adult fathers and pin feathers from molting, truly marking you as an adult. Aging.

You'll be gone soon. And he hates that thought.

Or, Pure Vanilla bonds with his offspring with wing grooming. Its normal, I swear. Or, or, Pure Vanilla lowkey crashes out in silence.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Content Warning For: Yandere Behaviour, Obsessive Behaviour, Platonic, Infantilism, Fear Of Death, Immortality, Implications Of Immortality, Posessive Behaviour, Overprotective Behaviour, Mental Instability, Deranged Pure Vanilla, Animal Instincts, Implied Murder (He Thinks About It For A Sec.), And Pure Vanilla Is Fucking Insane. Help.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Lowkey Pure Vanilla is a Yandere, so, platonic yandere. And lowkey having a time over the fact you arent immortal.

You know, do you think the Ancient children are immortal? From Royal Berry, we can see he isn't, and Dark Choco is clearly aging. I wonder what it would feel like to watch your child grow up and age and age, but you stay the same?

Desperately, you try and cling on, even as they age and you look more like their child then they are yours.

Anyways, I am of the opinion that the Ancients will crash tf out if any of their kids don't inherit the whole immortality thing they have going on. I KNOW DC would go batshit, bad father or not.

ALSO, GOT MY BOY SSC COOKIE!!! Got lucky with those soulstones in the new events and the guaranteed ssc.

Aughhhshs. I love himmmm...

Need to stay foucsed for that full Damage Bypass Beascuit and his outfittt...
